text: A bathroom has a tub but no shower.
Two giraffes standing near trees in a grassy area.
A room is cluttered with suitcases and boxes.
A young man is taking a photograph of himself.
a elephant stands next to another elephant
a bike with a lawn chair attached to part  of it
A woman standing with her hand on her head in a sea of luggage.
A vase full of red flowers against a blue wall.
A young girl holds a tennis racket and raises her arm.
Various cabinets and drawers are labelled with number tags.
